title: Fix optimizer contradictions report cache reuse

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implementing direct synchronous FeedbackContradictions execution in feedback_alignment_optimizer.yaml; removing background dispatch dependency on plexus command dispatcher and adding YAML regression assertions.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented synchronous contradictions execution in feedback_alignment_optimizer.yaml, removed background dispatch dependency on plexus command dispatcher, and added optimizer YAML regression coverage. Focused pytest passed. Started a small direct CLI verification run (procedure 002445d9-ae74-4179-b93a-60517ef30392) and confirmed the old pending-dispatcher error string was absent before stopping the run.
